title: Hallows-Eve
description: Halloween themed minigames/events that occur within the world, requiring some sort of ritual to initiate
body:
Hallow's Eve is my mod submission for the MCreative Discord Server's Halloween 2023 Modjam.

It will continue getting updates before and after the Modjam ends.

Items:
Nightmare Fuel: looks like shi-
Relic: ...

Biomes:
Pumpkin Patch: An orange, pumpkin infested landscape, a curse has befallen this land that takes away your creative abilities.

Cornfield: A land filled completely with corn, the same curse has befallen this land, luckily the corn generates outside the field.

Bosses:
none... yet

Events/Minigames
Harvest: A raid-like event that occurs near midnight in the pumpkin patch biome, when a player eats a pumpkin pie during a full moon. Zombies, Skeletons, Spiders, and(for now) Ravagers spawn in waves. There are 30 waves in total.

Corn maze: A randomly generated maze holding 3 relics, finding all 3 grants you your freedom, else you shall starve here.




join the MCreative Discord!
https://discord.gg/DJ5jxeG3HW
